1000110000100010 0010101001000111 1 -> sum: 1011011001101010, cout: 0
1100010100101100 0110111100011110 0 -> sum: 0011010001001010, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
